title: AI and agents took us from no Product in February to nearly $4,000 MRR in June (B2B SaaS Marketing Blueprint)
summary: Hey everybody. My partner and I started building our SaaS back in February, and in the last 100ish days have launched and are doing close to $4k MRR ($3,700). 100% bootstrapped. We have put all of our eggs into AI, agents, and automation when it comes to both product and marketing. Our monthly burn is around $1,000 right now. Most of which is spent on growth, AI, and infra. With a little bitty bit going towards paid ads. Here's what we did for Marketing + Growth: Our Six AI Content Agents We hav
